name: cad-spec-gen
description: CAD pipeline skill: design doc → design review → structured spec → code generation → 2D drawings → 3D renders → photorealistic images

skills.name: CAD Pipeline Assistant
skills.description: Natural-language assistant for the CAD rendering pipeline (16 intents: env check, config validation, next-step recommendation, materials, camera, exploded view, rendering, AI enhancement, troubleshooting, file structure, status, cross-model integration, BOM/parts, CAD spec, codegen, design review)

skills.name: CAD Spec Generator
skills.description: Phase 1: Extract 9 categories of structured data from design documents into CAD_SPEC.md. Supports --review mode: mechanical(A1-A3)/assembly(B1-B8)/material(C1-C3)/completeness(D) checks → DESIGN_REVIEW.md → user iterate / auto-fill (--auto-fill) / proceed → CAD_SPEC.md

skills.name: CAD Code Generator
skills.description: Phase 2: Generate CadQuery scaffolds (params.py, build_all.py, assembly.py, part modules, std_*.py standard parts) from CAD_SPEC.md using 5 Jinja2 generators (gen_params/gen_build/gen_parts/gen_assembly/gen_std_parts). Scaffold mode (default) never overwrites engineer-modified files. GATE-2: gen_parts.py auto-scans generated files for unfilled TODO: markers in coordinate system blocks — exits with code 2 if any found, listing file+line. NOTE: scaffolds need hand-written completion with correct axis orientation (cite design-doc line) before BUILD phase.

skills.name: Gemini AI Enhancement
skills.description: Phase 5: Enhance Blender-rendered PNG to photorealistic JPG via Gemini AI or ComfyUI (geometry locked, reskin only). v2.1: multi-view consistency — viewpoint lock (auto azimuth/elevation), image role separation (source first), V1-anchor reference, source high-fidelity. Layout-aware prompt routing (radial/linear/custom). Model selection via pipeline_config.json enhance section.

skills.name: Parametric Mechanical Design
skills.description: Manual parametric mechanical subsystem workflow: params.py → CadQuery 3D → GB/T 2D drawings → Blender rendering → AI enhancement. 6 phases with sub-command routing. Use /cad-codegen for automated scaffold generation first.

tools.name: cad_pipeline
tools.description: Unified 6-phase pipeline orchestrator: spec → codegen → build → render → enhance → annotate

tools.name: cad_spec_gen
tools.description: Extract structured CAD spec from Markdown design documents

tools.name: bom_parser
tools.description: Parse BOM tables from design documents into tree/JSON/summary

tools.name: gemini_enhance
tools.description: Image-to-image AI enhancement: Blender PNG → photorealistic JPG (geometry locked). gemini_gen.py is included in this repo; also discoverable via env var GEMINI_GEN_PATH or cad_paths.get_gemini_script(). Use 'python cad_pipeline.py enhance' for integrated workflow with auto-rename.

tools.name: annotate_render
tools.description: Add component labels (CN/EN) to rendered images via PIL. Leader lines + text on semi-transparent background.

pipeline.overview: Design Doc (.md) → DESIGN_REVIEW.md → CAD_SPEC.md → Jinja2 codegen → CadQuery (STEP/DXF/GLB) → DXF→PNG (auto) → Blender Cycles PNG → Gemini AI JPG → Annotated JPG
stages: Phase 1 SPEC: Design review + spec extraction (cad_spec_gen.py --review). GATE-1: CRITICAL issues block Phase 2.

Phase 2 CODEGEN: 5 Jinja2 generators → CadQuery scaffolds + std parts (codegen/gen_*.py). assembly.py now includes per-part offset positioning (translate() from §6.2) on top of station-level radial transforms. Standard parts with unrealistic dims (cables/harnesses) auto-capped. GATE-2: gen_parts.py scans TODO markers in coord-system blocks → exit(2) if unfilled.

Phase 3 BUILD: GATE-3: orientation_check.py asserts bounding-box principal axes vs design-doc → blocks build on FAIL. Then: parametric modeling → STEP + DXF + GLB (build_all.py). Post-build: auto-runs render_dxf.py to convert DXF → PNG engineering drawing previews (if script exists in subsystem dir).

Phase 4 RENDER: Blender Cycles N-view PNG from render_config.json camera dict (dynamic, not hardcoded). render_3d.py + render_exploded.py + render_section.py dispatched by view type. Post-render: writes render_manifest.json (session-new files only, partial flag on partial failure) and V*_labels.json sidecar (Blender world_to_camera_view projected anchor coords per component).

Phase 5 ENHANCE: AI enhancement → photorealistic JPG (Gemini or ComfyUI backend). Auto-enriches rc from params.py via prompt_data_builder (in-memory, no disk write). Material bridging: resolve_bom_materials() builds bom_id→component→material lookup chain; auto-creates missing materials+components entries from BOM with consistency validation. Reads render_manifest.json to process only session-new PNGs; falls back to glob when --dir supplied.

Phase 6 ANNOTATE: Component labels CN/EN (annotate_render.py). Reads V*_labels.json sidecar for geometrically accurate anchor coords (Blender-projected); falls back to render_config.json hardcoded coords when no sidecar present.
